info.title: Command line tool for watching and interpreting F# projects

options.name: --watch
options.description: Watch the source files of the project for changes

options.name: --webhook
options.description: Send the JSON-encoded contents of the PortaCode to the webhook

options.name: --eval
options.description: Evaluate the contents using the interpreter after each update

options.name: --livechecksonly
options.description:
(Experimental) Only evaluate declarations with a LiveCheck attribute
This uses on-demand execution semantics for top-level declarations

options.name: --writeinfo
options.description: (Experimental) Write an info file based on results of evaluation

options.name: --vshack
options.description: (Experimental) Watch for .fsharp/foo.fsx.edit files and use the contents of those

arguments.name: OTHER_ARGS
arguments.description: All other args are assumed to be extra F# command line arguments
